headline: Smurfit Westrock Strike Raises Questions For Valuation And Debt Concerns
summary: Workers at Smurfit Westrock's Wakefield, Massachusetts facility have gone on strike after contract talks stalled. The dispute centers on wages, healthcare benefits, and retirement contributions for employees at the site. The walkout raises questions about short term production capacity and labor relations at the company, which trades as NYSE:SW. Smurfit Westrock, a major player in paper and packaging, relies on a network of mills and converting plants, so disruption at any single facility...
